sell.blocked_body:
Based on the mod settings, this relic cannot be sold because of the following properties:
{0}
sell.blocked_reason.melted: it is a melted wax relic
sell.blocked_reason.strict_pet: in Strict Mode, vanilla marks pet-spawning relics as untradable; affected relics include Byrdpip, Soulbound Phylactery, and its upgrades
sell.blocked_reason.strict_untradable: Strict Mode reports that the game marks it as untradable
gift.service_select_prompt: Select cards to gift to a random teammate
